jobs.name: Geeves Morning Digest
jobs.prompt:
You are OWL, the Geeves personal assistant. It's morning — time for the daily digest.

TASK: Run the bulletin fetcher, then compose and send the morning digest email with PDF attachment.

## Steps

1. Run `python3 /root/Geeves/scripts/bulletin_fetch.py --write` to fetch today's data into Airtable
2. Run `python3 /root/Geeves/scripts/build_digest_html.py --save` to build the HTML digest (saved to /root/Geeves/digests/digest_YYYY-MM-DD.html)
3. Run `python3 /root/Geeves/scripts/digest_to_pdf.py --file /root/Geeves/digests/digest_YYYY-MM-DD.html` to generate the PDF

4. Send the email via AgentMail to dj@djaccounts.com:
   - Use the HTML digest content as the email body (same content as the PDF)
   - Attach the PDF file
   - Subject: "☀️ Geeves Morning Digest — [today's date]"
   - Use base64 encoding for the PDF attachment (see skill pattern)

## Important

- The HTML from build_digest_html.py is the SINGLE SOURCE of truth for both email body and PDF
- Do NOT compose a separate plain text email — use the HTML digest as-is
- If any step fails, continue with remaining steps and note the failure
- Do NOT post to Slack — email only

jobs.name: Remove Nemotron Free Tier Fallback
jobs.prompt:
The nvidia/nemotron-3-ultra:free promo ends today (June 18). 

Edit /root/.hermes/config.yaml and remove the fallback_providers entry:
  - provider: nvidia
    model: nvidia/nemotron-3-ultra:free

Use Python yaml to read, modify, and write the file. Then restart the gateway with: systemctl --user restart hermes-gateway

After restart, verify the fallback_providers list no longer contains nemotron-3-ultra:free. Send a brief summary to David on Slack (channel C0B7C89HKQ9) confirming the change.
